phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o parque de táxis deste terminal?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah oo PAR-kee jee TAK-sees DES-chee ter-mee-NOW
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese terminals direct passengers to outdoor ranks immediately upon exit for safety and flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, táxis junto à porta principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, TAHK-seesh ZHOONNG-too AH PAW-ruh-tuh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, taxis are next to the main door.

responses.english: Good morning, taxis are next to the main door.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, TAHK-seesh ZHOONNG-too AH PAW-ruh-tuh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, táxis junto à porta principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Central waiting areas are standard in Portuguese hubs and positioned near ticket windows.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Salão de Espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Waiting Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Waiting Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW suh-LOWN DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Salão de Espera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the self-service kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o quiosque de autoatendimento da Rede Expressos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH ow-toouh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DUH REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Self-service kiosks in Portugal streamline ticket printing and boarding pass collection.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque Rede Expressos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos kiosk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque Rede Expressos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pesar e registar a minha mala?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo pih-ZAHR EH reh-zheesh-TAHR AH MEE-nyuh MAH-luh?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage weighing is a mandatory procedural step before counter drop-off in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Na bilheteira rodoviária pode pesar e registar bagagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh PAW-dih pih-ZAHR EH reh-zheesh-TAHR buh-GAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: At the bus ticket counter you can weigh and check luggage.

responses.english: At the bus ticket counter you can weigh and check luggage.
responses.phonetic: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh PAW-dih pih-ZAHR EH reh-zheesh-TAHR buh-GAH-zhayng.
responses.local: Na bilheteira rodoviária pode pesar e registar bagagem.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage scale is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a balança para pesar a bagagem?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah bah-LAHN-sah PAH-rah peh-ZAH ah bah-gah-ZHEE
phrases.cultural_note: Weighing luggage before check-in is a standard procedural step in Portuguese transport hubs.

likely_response.local: A balança está junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH buh-LAHNNG-suh ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: The scale is near the ticket office.

responses.english: The scale is near the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: AH buh-LAHNNG-suh ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: A balança está junto à bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as janelas de venda de bilhetes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH zhuh-NEH-luhsh DIH VAYNG-duh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Counter windows 1 and 2 handle standard sales efficiently with minimal queueing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, bilheteira rodoviária no fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh NOO FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, bus ticket office at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, bus ticket office at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh NOO FOONNG-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, bilheteira rodoviária no fundo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o parque de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxi ranks in Portugal are strictly regulated, clearly marked, and located outdoors.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o parque de táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the taxi rank.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the taxi rank.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o parque de táxis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o parque de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese bus terminals, taxi ranks are typically located near the exit or main entrance. 'Parque de Táxis' is the standard term for taxi rank.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Parque de Táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the taxi rank.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the taxi rank.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Parque de Táxis.
